description_long: This is a large, rounded stone with a smooth, weathered surface and a muted tan coloration. The stone features subtle natural indentations and irregularities, with some areas showing slightly darker patches and faint, shallow markings. A small, rectangular yellow label with black text is affixed to one side, suggesting it may be cataloged or part of a managed environment. The overall shape is asymmetrical, with one side more flattened and the other gently domed, giving it a natural, river-worn appearance. The surface finish is matte and slightly rough, indicating exposure to the elements over time. This stone would be commonly found in urban parks, landscaped areas, or as a decorative barrier along sidewalks.
description: A large, rounded tan stone with a smooth, weathered surface and subtle natural markings, featuring a small yellow label on one side.
description_view_0: The stone appears broad and gently domed, with a visible yellow label and several shallow surface marks.
description_view_1: This view shows a more flattened side with subtle indentations and a generally uniform tan color.
description_view_2: The stone's profile is elongated and smooth, with the underside slightly visible and no label in sight.
description_view_3: A rounded, slightly sloped side is visible, showing a consistent tan color and a few natural surface irregularities.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on the ground
attribute_pattern: Faint, irregular mottling and shallow natural indentations; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Smooth and slightly roughened, indicating moderate weathering and exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically blends with natural landscaping elements or contrasts gently with paved surfaces; may be partially surrounded by grass or mulch.
